examples: Our defeat was expected but it is disappointing nevertheless.
There is little chance that we will succeed in changing the law. Nevertheless, it is important that we try.
Although the market has been flat, residential property costs remain high. Nevertheless, the fall-off in demand has had an impact on resale values.
Nevertheless, the various pieces don't make sense together, and yet they still add up.
Nevertheless, Tom (and another individual referred to only as Jay) appeared concerned, Wester said.
